translations.Notification Content Extension的部分，我只拉了一個: For the Notification Content Extension part, I only added a UIView that can display image notifications without much refinement:
translations.`serviceExtensionTimeWillExpire` 的部分我沒特別: I didn't handle anything special in the `serviceExtensionTimeWillExpire` part, so I won't include it; the key is still the `didReceive` code above.
translations.iOS 12之後支援更多動作處理： [iOS 12 新通知功能：添加互動性 在通: iOS 12 and later support more action handling: [iOS 12 New Notification Features: Adding Interactivity Implementing Complex Functions in Notifications](https://www.appcoda.com.tw/user-notifications-ios12/){:target="_blank"}
translations.「push_id」跟「image」都是我自訂的欄位，push_id用於辨識推播方: "push_id" and "image" are custom fields. "push_id" is used to identify the push notification, making it easier for us to send back data to the server for tracking; "image" is the URL of the image to be attached to the push notification.
translations.ㄧ樣會觸發Notification Service Extension didR: It will still trigger Notification Service Extension didReceive, then trigger AppDelegate's **func** application( **_** application: UIApplication, didReceiveRemoteNotification userInfo: [AnyHashable : **Any** ], fetchCompletionHandler completionHandler: **@escaping** (UIBackgroundFetchResult) -> Void) method.
translations.使用 Notification Content Extension 自訂推播按壓: Use Notification Content Extension to customize the UIView displayed when the notification is pressed (can be custom-made), as well as the press action.
translations.可以看到當接受到有推播通知時，我們先Call Api告訴後端有收到並將顯示推播了: You can see that when a push notification is received, we first call an API to inform the backend that the notification was received and displayed, which helps with backend push statistics; then, if there is an attached image, we process the image.
translations.可參考這篇： [iOS10推送通知进阶(Notification Extensi: You can refer to this article: [iOS10推送通知进阶(Notification Extension）](https://www.jianshu.com/p/78ef7bc04655#UNNotificationContentExtension-%E9%80%9A%E7%9F%A5%E5%86%85%E5%AE%B9%E6%89%A9%E5%B1%95){:target="_blank"}
translations.圖片推播、推播顯示統計、推播顯示前處理\n\n: Image Push Notifications, Notification Display Statistics, Pre-processing Before Notification Display
translations.如上圖所示，Notification Service Extension讓你在A: As shown in the above image, the Notification Service Extension allows you to preprocess the notification after the app receives it, before displaying the notification content.
translations.如上程式碼，NotificationService有兩個接口；第一個是 `did: As shown in the code above, NotificationService has two methods; the first is `didReceive`, which is triggered when a push notification arrives. After processing, you need to call the `contentHandler(bestAttemptContent)` callback method to notify the system.
translations.如果時間過久都沒呼叫CallBack Method，就會觸發第二個 functi: If the callback method is not called within the time limit, the second function `serviceExtensionTimeWillExpire()` will be triggered. At this point, it is basically too late to recover, and you can only perform some cleanup actions (e.g., simply modify the title or content without loading network data).
translations.官方文件寫到，我們針對推播進來的內容做處理時，處理時限大約30秒鐘，如果超過30: The official documentation states that when processing incoming push notification content, the time limit is about 30 seconds. If the callback is not made within 30 seconds, the notification will continue to be delivered and appear on the user's device.
translations.後端在推播時的結構要多加上一行 `“mutable-content\":1` 系: The backend must add the line `"mutable-content":1` in the push payload for the system to execute the Notification Service Extension upon receiving the push.

translations.關於基礎的推播建置、推播原理；網路資料很多，這邊就不再論述，本篇主要重點在如何讓: There is plenty of online information about basic push notification setup and principles, so this article will not cover those. The main focus here is how to enable image push notifications in the app and use new features to achieve more accurate push display statistics.
